## A note on access

Many of the readings the school uses are free online. Others require library access, purchase, or subscription. The school does not host or distribute copyrighted material; where a reading is paywalled or in print only, the index links to a publisher page or a lending copy and marks the access status.

## Status

This index is generated from theme content. To add a reading, add it to the relevant theme lens and re-run the generator. Contributions welcome via pull request.
